description: BotLens transport dashboard for bounded live-state delivery: payload size, ingest split timing, projector queues, replay/reset pressure, and viewer fanout.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(bucket_start, $__interval), CASE WHEN metric_name='ingest_receive_wait_ms' THEN 'ingest_receive_wait_ms' WHEN metric_name='ingest_json_decode_ms' THEN 'ingest_json_decode_ms' WHEN metric_name='ingest_route_ms' THEN 'ingest_route_ms' WHEN metric_name='telemetry_transport_send_ms' THEN 'telemetry_transport_send_ms' WHEN metric_name='telemetry_queue_wait_ms' THEN 'telemetry_queue_wait_ms' WHEN metric_name='symbol_fact_queue_wait_ms' THEN 'symbol_fact_queue_wait_ms' WHEN metric_name='symbol_projector_apply_ms' THEN 'symbol_projector_apply_ms' WHEN metric_name='fanout_delivery_ms' THEN 'fanout_delivery_ms' WHEN metric_name='viewer_broadcast_ms' THEN 'viewer_broadcast_ms' WHEN metric_name='viewer_send_ms' THEN 'viewer_send_ms' ELSE metric_name END AS metric, max(p95_value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_rollups_v1 WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_start) AND metric_name IN ('ingest_receive_wait_ms','ingest_json_decode_ms','ingest_route_ms','telemetry_transport_send_ms','telemetry_queue_wait_ms','symbol_fact_queue_wait_ms','symbol_projector_apply_ms','fanout_delivery_ms','viewer_broadcast_ms','viewer_send_ms') AND COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(bucket_start, $__interval), metric_name AS metric, max(value_max)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_rollups_v1 WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_start) AND metric_name IN ('telemetry_payload_bytes','telemetry_transport_payload_bytes','viewer_payload_bytes','ingest_payload_bytes') AND COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(bucket_start, $__interval), metric_name AS metric, sum(value_sum)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_rollups_v1 WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_start) AND metric_name IN ('reset_required_total','replay_miss_total','replay_hit_total','viewer_send_fail_total','symbol_fact_dropped_total','telemetry_enqueue_drop_total','telemetry_transport_send_fail_total') AND COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(bucket_start, $__interval), CONCAT_WS(' / ', metric_name, NULLIF(queue_name, ''), NULLIF(series_key, '')) AS metric, max(value_max)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_rollups_v1 WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_start) AND metric_name LIKE '%_utilization' AND COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT bucket_start AS time, metric_name, bot_id, run_id, series_key, queue_name, ROUND(p95_value::numeric, 2)::double precision AS p95, ROUND(p99_value::numeric, 2)::double precision AS p99, ROUND(value_max::numeric, 2)::double precision AS max, sample_count FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_rollups_v1 WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_start) AND metric_name IN ('ingest_receive_wait_ms','ingest_json_decode_ms','ingest_route_ms','telemetry_queue_wait_ms','telemetry_transport_send_ms','symbol_fact_queue_wait_ms','symbol_projector_apply_ms','fanout_delivery_ms','viewer_broadcast_ms','viewer_send_ms','telemetry_payload_bytes','viewer_payload_bytes','ingest_payload_bytes') AND COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' AND (COALESCE(series_key, '') = '' OR COALESCE(series_key, '') ~ '${series_key:regex}') ORDER BY value_max DESC LIMIT 50;

list.definition: SELECT '.*' AS __text, '.*' AS __value UNION SELECT DISTINCT bot_id AS __text, bot_id AS __value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_rollups_v1 WHERE bot_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1;
list.label: bot_id
list.name: bot_id
list.query: SELECT '.*' AS __text, '.*' AS __value UNION SELECT DISTINCT bot_id AS __text, bot_id AS __value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_rollups_v1 WHERE bot_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1;

list.definition: SELECT '.*' AS __text, '.*' AS __value UNION SELECT DISTINCT run_id AS __text, run_id AS __value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_rollups_v1 WHERE run_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1 DESC LIMIT 200;
list.label: run_id
list.name: run_id
list.query: SELECT '.*' AS __text, '.*' AS __value UNION SELECT DISTINCT run_id AS __text, run_id AS __value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_rollups_v1 WHERE run_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1 DESC LIMIT 200;

list.definition: SELECT '.*' AS __text, '.*' AS __value UNION SELECT DISTINCT series_key AS __text, series_key AS __value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_rollups_v1 WHERE series_key IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1;
list.label: series_key
list.name: series_key
list.query: SELECT '.*' AS __text, '.*' AS __value UNION SELECT DISTINCT series_key AS __text, series_key AS __value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_rollups_v1 WHERE series_key IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1;

title: BotLens Transport Control
